videos.title: Understanding is the new bottleneck — Geoffrey Litt, Notion
videos.summary: As AI handles more syntax and boilerplate code, your real value lies in system comprehension. This brilliant talk by Notion's Geoffrey Litt explains why 'understanding' is the premium skill for junior engineers looking to level up and stand out in the automated future.

videos.title: Should AI Engineers Still Read Code in 2026? The Z/L Continuum — Alex Volkov, ThursdAI
videos.summary: Struggling to figure out your professional worth in the age of generative AI? This video explores the 'Z/L Continuum' and answers the critical question of whether reading and writing code is still a vital skill for career growth and technical autonomy.

videos.title: [S01:E16] PERKESO wajibkan Skim Lindung 24 Jam, ramai pekerja terbeban? - Dr. Aimi, Economist
videos.summary: This video features an insightful discussion with Dr. Aimi Zulhazmi on the implementation of a 24-hour safety net for workers in Malaysia and the introduction of the Semak Kasih portal. They explore whether mandatory salary deductions are burdensome for different income groups and address why many insurance policies remain unclaimed by heirs. The core takeaway is that both policy adjustments and financial literacy are crucial for ensuring practical and effective social safety nets.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to the 24-hour social safety net and worker sentiments
Understanding the wage deduction structure and its impact on workers
Introduction and benefits of the Semak Kasih portal for insurance claims

videos.title: “The Malaysian government might be doing its job too well…” - World Bank Lead Economist
videos.summary: This video features Dr. Apurva Sanghi, Lead Economist for the World Bank Group in Malaysia, discussing the country's economic outlook amidst global supply-side crises and geopolitical tensions. He highlights how Malaysia's trade openness, particularly in semiconductors, can build resilience while addressing critical issues like fuel subsidies and productivity-driven wage growth. It is a must-watch for anyone interested in understanding the practical economic challenges and strategic policy decisions facing Malaysia in a volatile global market.

timestamps.topic: Global Economic Outlook & Middle East Crisis Impact
Understanding the Supply-Side Crisis in Malaysia
Addressing the Fuel Subsidy Dilemma
The Real Link Between Productivity and Wages

videos.title: Bosnia's Genocide, Up Close and Personal | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This deeply moving video follows Imam Omar Suleiman as he visits the Srebrenica Memorial Center in Bosnia, honoring the victims of the 1995 genocide. Through archival footage, personal testimonies, and the haunting preservation of victims' personal items, the video serves as a powerful reminder of the horrors of hatred and the resilience of faith. It urges viewers to never forget the tragedy of Srebrenica and to actively stand against injustice and violence in all forms.

timestamps.topic: The tragedy of Srebrenica and the weight of memory
Archival footage: A father's heartbreaking call to his son
A survivor's emotional testimony on grief and remembrance

videos.title: Time-Saving Habits
videos.summary: Struggling to keep up with endless podcasts, audiobooks, and lectures? This video reveals a game-changing time-saving habit: training your brain to listen to audio at faster speeds. By gradually increasing playback speed, you can absorb more information in half the time, making it a must-watch for anyone looking to boost their productivity.

timestamps.topic: The concept of speed listening for information absorption
How to gradually train your brain to listen at higher speeds
Why speed listening is a game-changer for study and work

videos.title: The Surprising Truth About Money and Luck
videos.summary: Gain a healthier perspective on financial success by understanding the distinct roles that effort and luck play in wealth. It's an essential reality check for anyone early in their career aiming for financial independence.

videos.title: How to vibe code Android apps
videos.summary: Artificial intelligence is changing the nature of software engineering, and 'vibe coding' is the latest paradigm shift. Learn how to work alongside AI tools to build and deploy Android apps faster than ever before.

videos.title: Create clean LLM service interfaces with wrapper classes!
videos.summary: Level up your codebase by learning how to write clean, maintainable wrapper classes for LLM services. This concrete architectural pattern will help you write production-grade code that stands out to senior engineers.

videos.title: What do we build now? — Theo Browne, @t3dotgg
videos.summary: This thought-provoking keynote by Theo Browne explores the rapid evolution of AI models and how they are shifting the boundaries of what is possible in software development. Browne challenges developers to overcome their traditional mindsets, embrace the power of orchestration, and start thinking 'wider' rather than just 'bigger' when building new products. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to understand how the role of the software engineer is being redefined in the age of AI.

timestamps.topic: The Evolution of AI Models from Sonnet 3.5 to Opus 4.5
Understanding the Eras of AI: Tool Calls, Long-Running Work, and Orchestration
Why Developers Need to Get Over Their Skeuomorphic Mindsets

videos.title: Think You Can Build a Game with AI? Think Again! - Danielle An & David Hoe, Meta
videos.summary: This engaging presentation explores how generative AI is transforming the landscape of game development, moving from simple prompt-based creations to sophisticated, dynamic, and personalized gaming experiences. The speakers from Meta share valuable insights on utilizing key art as a creative anchor and integrating runtime LLMs to build games that feel truly personal. It's a must-watch for anyone curious about the future of AI-driven game design and the shift from linear development to highly iterative, parallel processes.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to AI-driven gaming creation and personal journeys
The evolution from 'vibe-coding' to more sophisticated AI game development
Using key art as inspiration and an anchor for AI game design

videos.title: GTM Is You - Victoria Melnikova, Evil Martians
videos.summary: This video explores why a founder's personal brand is the ultimate go-to-market strategy for developer tools in 2026 and beyond. By analyzing successful devtool startups and featuring insights from industry leaders, it provides a practical roadmap for leveraging authenticity and physical presence to cut through the noise of AI-generated content. If you're a technical founder looking to build trust and scale your audience, this presentation offers the essential playbook for turning your unique traits into a competitive moat.

timestamps.topic: Introducing the PMF Compass and why 90% of early-stage startups struggle with distribution
The 6-step basic GTM hygiene framework for devtool founders
Why being unapologetically yourself and building a personal brand is your ultimate competitive moat

videos.title: Building an Android app in AI Studio
videos.summary: This video is a game-changer for anyone who has ever wanted to build their own Android app but lacked the coding skills to do so. In just a few minutes, you'll learn how to use Google AI Studio to turn a simple text prompt into a fully functional, personalized Android app and seamlessly install it directly onto your phone. It's an incredibly empowering look at the future of app development, showing that the only limit to creating your own tools is your imagination.

timestamps.topic: How to prompt Google AI Studio to design your custom Android app
Previewing and selecting your app's visual theme
Step-by-step guide to enabling developer settings and installing the app on your phone

videos.title: Create agent skills for on-device generative AI (I/O Connect ‘26)
videos.summary: This video is a must-watch for developers looking to unlock the potential of on-device generative AI, showcasing how to build custom "Agent Skills" using Google's LiteRT-LM framework. Viewers will learn how to bypass the limitations of cloud-dependent models to create faster, more private, and offline-capable AI applications. The core takeaway is a practical guide on integrating modular, structured skills—such as task planning and timing—directly into edge devices using Google AI Edge tools.

timestamps.topic: The benefits of running AI on the Edge
Overview of the Google AI Edge end-to-end pipeline
Deep dive into LiteRT-LM for generative AI on-device

videos.title: The hidden cost of apologizing too much at work | Teresa Caro | TEDxBuckheadAve
videos.summary: This highly engaging TEDx talk dives into the psychology of over-apologizing and how constantly saying 'I'm sorry' can subtly erode your authority and leadership. Speaker Teresa Caro introduces 'Unapologetic Prioritization,' a powerful framework designed to help you set clear boundaries, vocalize your needs, and lead with confidence without unnecessary guilt.

timestamps.topic: How 'I'm sorry' signals perceived failure and erodes authority
Introducing the concept of Unapologetic Prioritization
Protecting what is essential to preserve your values and leadership
